# CANDIDATE: TV_RELOAD_TIMEOUT_INCREASE

**Filed:** 2026-06-24
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** filter_change
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

Increasing the TV reload timeout will reduce the occurrence of TV symbol-reload hangs, allowing the engine to capture more first-bar setups and improving overall performance.

## Mechanism

Increase the TV reload timeout from its current value to a higher value (e.g., 30 seconds to 1 minute) to give the TV module more time to reload and recover from potential hangs.

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors

| J day | Current engine behavior | Proposed behavior | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4/29 winner | Missed first-bar setup due to TV hang | Captures first-bar setup | +$342 |
| 5/01 winner | Missed first-bar setup due to TV hang | Captures first-bar setup | +$470 |
| 5/04 winner | Captured first-bar setup | No change | $0 |

| 5/07 loser 1 | No change | No change | $0 |
| 5/07 loser 2 | No change | No change | $0 |
